ack.detail: MLLP TCP listener auto-generates AA, AE or AR ACK before processing.
ack.evidence: Optegra | PAS IN V2 | 95c2746a70aa6d108a56f017cc7c631777d3d74fe6149bca2251e03be78aae3a | canonical/Optegra/PAS IN V2.xml | source connector lines 18-35 and HL7 response generation lines 80-91

field_map.note: Used by secondary-patient body and merge body.
Title case conversion; middle name appended to FirstName.
Only P/H addresses; P type becomes HOME and missing country becomes GB.
Phone is emitted only when numeric; CP maps mobile and NET maps email.
Truncated to six and eight characters respectively.
Formats date as YYYY-MM-DD and time as HH:MM.
Builds Scheduled, Did Not Attend, Transferred, Departed, Arrived or Discharged status text.
